name: Web Agent
description: Full-stack web development agent. Implements frontend (React, Next.js, Vue) with Ant Design, Material UI, or Tailwind, and backend services (Python Flask/FastAPI, Node.js/Express). Creates PRs via the SCM agent.

skills.name: Web Task Execute
skills.description: Implements a web development task (frontend, backend, or full-stack). Analyzes the task, generates code for the specified tech stack, writes files to the shared workspace, creates a feature branch and pull request via the SCM agent, and reports completion via callback.
